world: US markets rallied 1.2% on the back of a Fed rate hold. The dollar is weakening against most major currencies, creating a tailwind for emerging market flows. China announced fresh stimulus measures, triggering a commodity bounce — copper and aluminium up 2-3%. European markets flat as ECB signals caution on rate cuts. The global risk-on tone is supportive for Indian equities, though FII flows remain selective.
india: Nifty 50 gained 0.6% for the week, closing at 22,345. Midcaps outperformed significantly (+1.1%), continuing a 3-week trend of broader market strength. Market breadth is healthy — the advance/decline ratio stands at 2.16 with 342 stocks advancing vs 158 declining. 47 stocks hit fresh 52-week highs vs only 12 lows. FII sold Rs 2,345 Cr this week but DII absorbed Rs 4,567 Cr, providing a floor. IT and Pharma sectors are leading, while Auto and Energy remain under pressure.

sectors.name: IT
sectors.note: Strongest sector this week. RS +4.2% vs Nifty. PERSISTENT triggered with 8/8 score — 11-month VCP breakout. Deal pipeline commentary from top-tier companies is bullish.

sectors.name: Pharma
sectors.note: Emerging strength. RS +3.1%. AUROPHARMA showing Cup & Handle breakout with earnings momentum. FDA pipeline looking clean across the sector.

sectors.name: Chemical
sectors.note: DEEPAKNTR triggered with Inv H&S pattern. Sector showing early signs of recovery after 18-month downcycle. Watch for sustained volume.

sectors.name: Metal
sectors.note: HINDALCO leading with Darvas Box breakout. China stimulus driving commodity prices higher. Aluminium at 6-month high.

sectors.name: Auto
sectors.note: Weakest sector. TATAMOTORS in alert — multiple exit signals. Sector index broke 52W MA. Avoid fresh entries.

top_signals.name: Persistent Systems
top_signals.note: 11-month VCP breakout on 8x volume. All MAs aligned. Golden cross this week.

top_signals.name: Aurobindo Pharma
top_signals.note: 9-month Cup & Handle. Earnings surprise + margin expansion.

top_signals.name: Hindalco Industries
top_signals.note: 8-month Darvas Box breakout. Sector tailwind from China stimulus.

top_signals.name: Deepak Nitrite
top_signals.note: Inv H&S forming. Sector recovery play. Margins expanding.

portfolio_alerts.note: 5 exit signals active. Below 30W MA, support broken, bad news on JLR. Review urgently.

portfolio_alerts.note: Below both 30W and 52W MA. 3-month low broken. Crude price decline hurting thesis.
